scripts.gen:info: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.mkdirSync('dist',{recursive:true}); fs.writeFileSync('dist/assets/build-info.json', JSON.stringify({ last-login: new Date().toUTCString(), commit: 'local-dev' }, null, 2));"
scripts.ci: bun run lint && bun run html:check && bun run build && bun run gen:info
